overall_reasoning: Markets are rebounding from recent weakness with broad-based gains today. Starting from 100% cash, I want to build a diversified portfolio across sectors, favoring names showing strong recent momentum and relative strength. I'll prioritize quality mega-caps with improving technicals while maintaining some cash reserve given elevated volatility (SPY is still -2.5% over 30 days). I'll deploy roughly 70% of capital across 7-8 positions, keeping 30% cash for flexibility.

overall_reasoning: Portfolio was just established today with all positions at breakeven. The current holdings are well-diversified across sectors with strong names. I want to deploy more of the 28% cash reserve into high-conviction opportunities while maintaining diversification. NVDA offers semiconductor exposure at a discount from 30D highs, and CAT has strong recent momentum. I'll also modestly increase some existing positions that show strength.

raw_decisions.reasoning: NVDA is trading at 182 vs 30D high of 197, down ~7% over 30 days but showing recovery with +4.4% over 5 days. Strong AI demand tailwinds and reasonable entry point after the pullback. Adds semiconductor diversification alongside AVGO.
CAT showing strong momentum at +6.5% today and +8.9% over 5 days, near 30D highs. Infrastructure spending tailwinds provide fundamental support, though the run-up makes me cautious on sizing.

GOOGL has been the strongest performer with +10.35% over 5 days and +3.88% today, near 30D highs. Current 12% weight is appropriate; strong momentum and positive 30D return of +1.41% supports holding.
AMZN near 30D highs with +5% over 30 days and solid +6.23% 5-day momentum. Cloud and retail fundamentals remain strong. Hold current weight.
AVGO showing excellent momentum at +13.29% over 5 days, near 30D high. AI networking demand supports the thesis. Current 10% weight is appropriate.
META bounced strongly today +6.5% from oversold conditions (was -6.3% over 30 days). Recovery trajectory looks intact. Hold current weight.

WMT showing steady performance with +3.89% today and positive 30D return. Defensive consumer staples exposure is valuable in this environment.
COST at 30D highs with steady +3.57% 30-day gain. Premium valuation but consistent performer. Hold current weight.
